bead.title: Stage 1.11: update external docs (website, personas, resources)
bead.description: Update docs/helix-adjacent files referencing the frontend stack: website/content/docs/server/_index.md, library/personas/architect-systems.md, any docs/resources/*.md that reference the stack. Swap to SvelteKit+GraphQL+Houdini+Bun. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 1 bead #11.
bead.acceptance: (1) website/content/docs/server/_index.md has zero React references. (2) library/personas/architect-systems.md architectural context section names SvelteKit+GraphQL. (3) All files compile/render (no broken markdown).

events.body:
Opus review of 5acf9bf. The commit only edited library/personas/architect-systems.md (2-line React->SvelteKit swap). The bead explicitly listed website/content/docs/server/_index.md as a target, but grep shows:

  website/content/docs/server/_index.md:47: **Full-text search**: Powered by MiniSearch across all bead fields

This is a current-tense feature description, NOT historical framing. MiniSearch is being replaced by GraphQL+Houdini server-side search per ADR-005 v2. The bead fails its hard grep acceptance on an explicitly-listed target.

REQUIRED FIX: Edit website/content/docs/server/_index.md line 47 to describe the new GraphQL/Houdini-based search (or remove the bullet entirely and replace with a GraphQL-based feature description). Leave library/personas/architect-systems.md alone (already fixed).

docs/resources/spec-driven.md:182 has a historical framing reference — acceptable, classify as (a) in the sweep.

REJECT - REOPEN bead.
events.summary: REJECT: website/content/docs/server/_index.md:47 still says "MiniSearch" as current feature; bead never touched that target file
